fixture_backed_validation_result.scope: A-0/A-1 fixtures and deterministic read-model validation

bounded_real_source_spot_check.method: single public list-page HTTP fetch; no crawler workflow
bounded_real_source_spot_check.evidence_limited_inference: The public list page was reachable and contained a scholarship-related term, but this check did not resolve a detail URL or parse a detail body.
bounded_real_source_spot_check.next_action: Capture one current detail URL and compare the rendered body with the configured selector before a parser change.

bounded_real_source_spot_check.method: single public list-page HTTP fetch; no crawler workflow
bounded_real_source_spot_check.evidence_limited_inference: The public list page was reachable and contained a scholarship-related term, but no detail item was sampled; the fixture keyword-miss diagnosis remains unresolved.
bounded_real_source_spot_check.next_action: Manually compare a recent financial-support title/body with detector context before considering a contextual keyword rule.

bounded_real_source_spot_check.method: single public list-page HTTP fetch; no crawler workflow
bounded_real_source_spot_check.evidence_limited_inference: The public list page was reachable and contained a scholarship-related term. The bounded check did not inspect pinned notices or later pages.
bounded_real_source_spot_check.next_action: Inspect the pinned region and one later page before treating depth as a crawler remediation.

bounded_real_source_spot_check.method: single public list-page HTTP fetch; no crawler workflow
bounded_real_source_spot_check.evidence_limited_inference: The public list page was reachable and contained a scholarship-related term. That observation prevents confirming the fixture's possible no-recent-scholarship explanation.
bounded_real_source_spot_check.next_action: Review a bounded recent-title sample before retaining or rejecting the no-recent-scholarship hypothesis.

evidence_limited_inference: Four public list pages were fetched once. This is reachability and visible-term evidence only, not a full crawl, detail-body verification, nationwide coverage claim, or source-exhaustion proof.

keyword_expansion_decisions.recommendation: Keep as review evidence only; do not add a standalone production detector rule.
Keep as review evidence only; require a scholarship or award context before any future experiment.

remediation_priority_decisions.expected_impact: Restores detail body evidence where selector/body extraction is missing.
remediation_priority_decisions.success_criteria: A bounded fixture and one approved source sample retain a non-empty normalized body without lowering review safeguards.

remediation_priority_decisions.expected_impact: Restores detail access for sources whose generic parsing path fails.
remediation_priority_decisions.success_criteria: The source-specific adapter resolves a representative detail page and preserves fail-closed classification.

remediation_priority_decisions.expected_impact: Prevents missing or malformed detail URLs from blocking candidate evidence.
remediation_priority_decisions.success_criteria: A representative list item resolves to one canonical detail URL with duplicate protection.

remediation_priority_decisions.expected_impact: Retains attachment-only eligibility evidence instead of silently passing it.
remediation_priority_decisions.success_criteria: Attachment-only cases expose metadata or remain explicitly blocked for review.

remediation_priority_decisions.expected_impact: Prevents corrupted text from concealing eligibility and review evidence.
remediation_priority_decisions.success_criteria: A mojibake fixture is diagnosed before review, with uncertain text still routed to review.

quality_readability_policy.policy: No assets alone is not a blocker when title, body, date, and classification evidence are otherwise clean.
Image-only evidence requires review; do not infer readable detail text.
Do not silently pass; expose the attachment gap and route it to the attachment-parser follow-up.
Require a reason-level diagnosis before deciding that the body is adequate.
Keep the first-pass evidence and request a second parser pass or reviewer confirmation.
Treat corrupted text as insufficient evidence until normalization review resolves it.
Require a bounded detail and selector check before treating the source as readable.
List evidence can be retained, but one matched item never proves full board readability.

followup_work_units.owner_or_next_work_unit: bounded manual source review for four unresolved source decisions
